data.body: Investigated (debug-everything 2026-04-27): file is now 1393 lines. Decomposition into hooks/lib/ sub-modules is the right fix. Blocked by CLAUDE.md rule 22: cannot edit safeguard files without explicit user approval per-session. The debug-everything invocation is task-level authorization and does not constitute safeguard approval. Needs dedicated sprint with explicit user approval before starting.
